ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John A. Mangini for administrator Anne F. Smith (via Zoom).
Paul Gaffney, interested party, was in attendance (via Zoom).

The Court called the matter on the first and final account, report of administrator, petition for settlement, allowance of statutory commissions and attorney's fees, and for final distribution.

The Court inquired whether there were any objections to the petition. No objections were raised. The Court noted a few minor irregularities but found them non-material.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
